name: Topsy Turvy Apple Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
INGREDIENT LIST SHOULD READ: 6 cups sliced tart apples (about 2 1/2 lbs.).
1. Spread softened butter evenly on bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie pan.
2. Press pecan halves, rounded side down, into the butter.
3. Pat brown sugar evenly over the pecans.
4. Roll out enough pastry for one crust; place in the pie pan over the filling; trim, leaving 1/2 inch overhang.
5. Combine remaining ingredients; pour into the pie pan, keeping the top level.
6. Top with remaining pastry; trim even with the bottom crust; fold edges together, flush with the rim; flute.
7. Prick the top of the pie with a fork.
8. Bake in a hot oven, 450°F, for 10 minutes; reduce heat to moderate, 350°F; bake 30-45 minutes or longer, or until apples are tender.
9. Remove from the oven.
10. When the syrup in the pan stops bubbling, place a serving plate over the pie; invert.
11. Carefully remove the pie pan.
Serve hot.
